name: url-shortener
description: Self-hosted URL shortener — Express + Drizzle backend, React + Vite frontend.

scripts.build: npm run build --prefix apps/backend && npm run build --prefix apps/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix apps/backend && npm run typecheck --prefix apps/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix apps/backend && npm run lint --prefix apps/frontend
scripts.format: npm run format --prefix apps/backend && npm run format --prefix apps/frontend
scripts.clean: npm run clean --prefix apps/backend && npm run clean --prefix apps/frontend
